entries.name: sea-orm-arrow
entries.reason: SeaORM 2.0.0 records this optional Arrow integration in Cargo.lock, but the feature is not enabled and upstream has not published a stable sea-orm-arrow release.

entries.name: rustfs/rustfs
entries.reason: RustFS still publishes only prerelease 1.0.0 images. Keep the already validated beta.8 test image until a stable compatible tag exists instead of changing between beta builds implicitly.
